title: “Gotta Stop the Cheating Before There’s Cheating”: MLB Orders Crackdown After Teams Use AI to Decide In-Game Decisions
description: Before the second half of the season, the MLB is banning the use of artificial intelligence that can influence in-game decisions.

title: Pudu Robotics Highlights Its "One Brain, Multiple Embodiments" Physical Agent at WAIC 2026
description: **media[1141203]**SHANGHAI, July 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Pudu Robotics, the global leader in commercial service robotics, today hosted its Pudu AI Technology Briefing on the opening day of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai. During the event, the company shared the latest progress of its 'One Brain, Multiple Embodiments' technology architecture, offering an in-depth look at its Physical Agent architecture while presenting the PUDU D7, its industrial-grade semi-humanoid robot, in its first offline public showcase.

title: Venture capital investments increasingly shaping innovation in radiology
description: A new study published in the Journal of the American College of Radiology (JACR) suggests that venture capital (VC) is playing a significant and growing role in driving innovation in radiology. The study, "Venture Capital Investments in Radiology from 2000–2023," found that a total of $11.4 billion was invested across 646 companies, with funding especially concentrated in medical devices, artificial intelligence health care software, and biotechnology and drug discovery.

title: UN Chief Advocates AI-Boosted Early Warning Systems for Climate Resilience
description: UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres emphasized the urgent need for AI-powered early warning systems to mitigate climate disasters. Speaking at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference, Guterres highlighted the importance of international cooperation and technology sharing to protect vulnerable populations from climate risks while promoting sustainable tech practices.
